---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
subtitle: My CV was generated using the `{vitae}` R package, with source code found [here](https://github.com/dionnecargy/cv) and the pdf can be downloaded [here](/pages_cv/CV_DA_2026.pdf).
title-block-banner: "#AA8897"
title-block-banner-color: white
page-layout: full
---

*Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`*

<iframe src="/pages_cv/CV_DA_2026.pdf" width="100%" height="800px"></iframe>
